hero.title: Capture any page. Send it to chat.
hero.subtitle: One click delivers the current page's structured metadata plus your saved prompt into an IM or AI Agent chat session.
useCases.title: What it's for
useCases.personal.title: Personal knowledge capture
useCases.personal.description: Clip articles and references into your own knowledge base as you read.
useCases.team.title: Team sharing
useCases.team.description: Send a structured page summary into a team channel instead of pasting raw links.
useCases.agent.title: Agent / llm-wiki workflows
useCases.agent.description: Feed structured page sources to an AI Agent that builds a persistent llm-wiki knowledge base.
payload.title: Structured payload, not copy-paste
payload.description: Every clip carries six structured fields — far more reusable than a manually pasted link.
payload.field.title: title
payload.value.title: structuredClone() - Web APIs | MDN
payload.value.description: The structuredClone() global function creates a deep clone of a given value using the structured clone algorithm.
payload.value.content:
# structuredClone()

The global `structuredClone()` method creates a deep clone of a given value using the structured clone algorithm…
payload.value.prompt: Summarize this page and add it to my llm-wiki.
supportedPlatforms.title: Supported platforms
flow.title: Three steps
flow.step1.title: Capture the page
flow.step1.description: Click the toolbar icon to extract structured metadata from the current tab.
flow.step2.title: Choose a target
flow.step2.description: Pick the IM channel or Agent session you want to send to.
flow.step3.title: Send to chat
flow.step3.description: The message is composed and delivered straight into the chat input.
trust.privacy.title: Privacy facts
trust.privacy.fact1: Capture runs only when you click the extension icon — nothing happens in the background.
trust.privacy.fact2: Everything is stored in local browser storage, on your device only.
trust.privacy.fact3: Delivery uses direct browser tab navigation and DOM injection.
trust.privacy.fact4: No remote server — the extension never operates or communicates with one.
trust.privacy.fact6: No third-party analytics or tracking SDKs.
trust.permissions.title: Permission facts
trust.permissions.fact1: Production permissions: activeTab, alarms, scripting, storage, webNavigation.
trust.permissions.fact2: Static host access covers only known chat platforms: discord.com, app.slack.com, slack.com, web.telegram.org.
trust.permissions.fact3: Self-hosted OpenClaw origins are granted at runtime, per specific origin, only when you configure them.
limits.title: Known limits
limits.telegram: Telegram is shipped with live UAT pending — treat it as a known risk until real-session verification lands.
limits.feishu: Feishu/Lark was evaluated and dropped from shipped scope due to unreliable shared URL targeting.
limits.nyquist: Phase 11/12 Nyquist verification is partial — recorded as a known risk only.
proof.label: mockup
proof.status: marketing demo aligned to current UI contract
cta.title: Start with the source
cta.subtitle: web2chat is open source. Read the code, load it unpacked, or grab a release build.
